text: Good morning Jarvis! Any major events scheduled for today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, July 20. No work meetings today. You have Sarah wanting to work on her design course and working on the garage cabinetry.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Great progress. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the smart-home hub is acting up today. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Let's get that resolved. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Catan is always a good time. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Putting together our grocery list. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Yum, that sounds delicious! I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Good way to wrap up the day. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Bedtime can be a challenge. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan's team played a match and won 1-0! It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Busy day for sports! What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Checking on some house maintenance items. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Let's get that resolved. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Planning a street block party soon. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. Catan is always a good time. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that planning our weekly meals today. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! I've got the grocery list ready. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Reading a new book before bed. It was a really interesting history episode. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Good way to wrap up the day. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Bedtime can be a challenge. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
